Tests the Boolean conversion of a negative integer in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Boolean` function in JavaScript. It verifies that the `Boolean` function correctly converts the negative integer `-11111` to `true`. The test uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expression `true === Boolean(-11111)` evaluates to `true`, confirming that non-zero numbers, including negative integers, are truthy in JavaScript. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of type conversion in JavaScript.
